data.description: Fix-it ticket minted mid-MA-24: Google retired gemini-2.5-pro for new API users (generateContent returns 404 'no longer available to new users'; ListModels still lists it — the listing lies). Operator decision: 3.1 family. Change lib/models.ts: GEMINI_PRO = gemini-3.1-pro-preview, GEMINI_FLASH = gemini-3.1-flash-lite (DEFAULT_MODEL stays GEMINI_PRO). Update README model references (recording section call plan + cassette table). Handle cassette-keyed unit tests: keys = sha256(model+schema+prompt) so all existing cassette-backed tests will MISS under new IDs until the operator re-records at MA-24 — apply the established skip-marker-naming-MA-24 pattern where misses fail (e2e already skips via fingerprint). Old 2.5-keyed cassette files become stale leftovers; note for MA-24 that the record run will report them for deletion. Keep fast suite green, tsc/biome clean, debt-gates green. Blocks MA-24 (operator re-record), which blocks MA-22.
data.title: Migrate Gemini model IDs to 3.1 family

data.body:
<review>
Own-reviewer verdict (diff 78d125e vs origin/main@abfeb39): APPROVE — no Critical/Major findings.

Scope check:
- src/lib/models.ts is the only source change: GEMINI_PRO = gemini-3.1-pro-preview, GEMINI_FLASH = gemini-3.1-flash-lite, DEFAULT_MODEL untouched (= GEMINI_PRO). Comment documents the 2026-07 2.5 retirement (404 at generateContent, ListModels still lying) and the knowingly-accepted -preview retirement risk. Matches the binding operator decision exactly.
- Five hermetic cassette tests swapped 2.5 key literals for models.ts imports (GEMINI_PRO/GEMINI_FLASH/DEFAULT_MODEL). Key computation semantics unchanged (same sha256(model\nschema\nprompt)[0:16]); the AC-24 parity pin survives — a cassette HIT still proves the handler sent exactly the constant's model id and prompt bytes. Test names now reference constant names, stable across future migrations.
- README recording section: spend note names the 3.1 IDs; cassette table annotated as recorded under retired 2.5 IDs, stale until MA-24, filenames will change (model is a hash component).
- G-1 respected: falcon-agent untouched. Cassette JSONs untouched. debt-gates gemini-literal gate (src-scoped) unaffected and passing.

Minor (accepted, no change): SPEC.md:46 and historical docs still quote 2.5 values — left deliberately as point-in-time records; ticket + PR record the superseding decision.

Gates: fast suite 146/146 green; tsc --noEmit clean; biome clean (59 files); debt-gates.sh all 9 gates PASS; check-planted-defects.sh exit 0 (all 17 assertions); record dry-run prints the new IDs for all 5 call sites with no script changes (models.ts imports already in place per MA-8/AC-22).

No MA-24 skip-markers needed: fast-suite cassette tests are self-recording (green under new IDs via the constant imports); the only fixtures/cassettes consumer is the e2e, excluded from the fast suite and already fast-skipping via the MA-26 fingerprint path (no manifest on disk; CI runs test:full with E2E_REQUIRED=0 until MA-24).
</review>

PR open: https://github.com/mrojas54/maltese-agent/pull/60 (head 78d125e, base main).

Change inventory: src/lib/models.ts → GEMINI_PRO = gemini-3.1-pro-preview, GEMINI_FLASH = gemini-3.1-flash-lite (DEFAULT_MODEL stays GEMINI_PRO; retirement + -preview risk documented in comment); five hermetic cassette tests swapped 2.5 key literals for models.ts constant imports (no skip-markers needed — they self-record and stay green; AC-24 parity pin preserved); README recording section updated (3.1 spend note, cassette table annotated stale-until-MA-24).

For MA-24: the five old 2.5-keyed cassettes (0f402318…, 1581f1e4…, 7a84e877…, 958680ee…, d23b8286….json) are left on disk deliberately — the record run will report them as untouched stale leftovers for deletion. No .e2e-fingerprint.json exists yet; run npm run e2e:fingerprint after recording. record dry-run already prints the 3.1 plan.

Gates: fast suite 146/146, tsc clean, biome clean, debt-gates 9/9 PASS, check-planted-defects exit 0, dry-run shows new IDs.

Merged (PR #60, operator-authorized). Model IDs migrated to operator-chosen 3.1 family (gemini-3.1-pro-preview / gemini-3.1-flash-lite) at the single authoritative site; test literals now import constants; no skip-markers needed (fast-suite cassette tests are hermetic self-recorders). Unblocks MA-24.
